description: 自我介绍标准开场。替换槽位：名字。
examples_json: [{"en":"Hello! I am Tom.","zh":"你好！我是汤姆。"}]

description: 说明身份。替换槽位：职业/身份。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am a teacher.","zh":"我是一名老师。"}]

description: 说明国籍/来源地。替换槽位：国家/城市。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am from Japan.","zh":"我来自日本。"}]

description: 说明年龄。替换槽位：数字。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am 25 years old.","zh":"我 25 岁。"}]

text: I am very happy to meet you.
description: 表达感受。替换槽位：形容词(happy/glad/excited)。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am glad to meet you.","zh":"我很高兴认识你。"}]

text: I am not a teacher. I am a student.
description: 否定+纠正。替换槽位：两个相反身份。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am not a doctor. I am a nurse.","zh":"我不是医生。我是护士。"}]

difficulty: 我迟到了吗？不，你没迟到。
description: L1
examples_json: 疑问+否定回答。替换槽位：形容词(right/ready/welcome)。
column9: [{"en":"Am I right? Yes, you are right.","zh":"我对了吗？是的，你对了。"}]

description: 赞美对方。替换槽位：形容词(smart/funny/helpful/beautiful)。
examples_json: [{"en":"You are very smart.","zh":"你很聪明。"}]

description: 表示同意。替换槽位：形容词(right/wrong/correct/welcome)。
examples_json: [{"en":"You are welcome.","zh":"不客气。"}]

description: L1
examples_json: Yes/No疑问句。替换槽位：身份名词。
column9: [{"en":"Are you a teacher? No, I am not.","zh":"你是老师吗？不，我不是。"}]

text: You are not alone. I am here.
meaning: 你不是一个人。我在这里。
description: 否定+安慰。替换槽位：形容词(late/wrong/alone)。

text: How are you? I am fine

column9: [{"en":"How are you? I am great!","zh":"你好吗？我很好！"}]

description: 指认事物。替换槽位：名词(pen/phone/cup/car/key)。
examples_json: [{"en":"It is a phone.","zh":"这是一部手机。"}]

description: 描述大小。替换槽位：形容词(big/small/tall/short/long)。
examples_json: [{"en":"It is very small.","zh":"它很小。"}]

text: What is this? It is a phone.

text: It is not expensive. It is cheap.

examples_json: [{"en":"It is not big. It is small.","zh":"它不大。它很小。"}]

description: L1
examples_json: 评价问句。替换槽位：形容词(new/old/cheap/ready)。
column9: [{"en":"Is it new? No, it is old.","zh":"它是新的吗？不，是旧的。"}]

description: 描述位置。替换槽位：介词(on/in/under/behind/next to)。

description: 说明职业。替换槽位：职业(nurse/lawyer/writer/chef)。

description: 说明国籍。替换槽位：国家。

description: 说明年龄。替换槽位：数字。
examples_json: [{"en":"He is 30 years old.","zh":"他 30 岁。"}]

description: 多特征描述。替换槽位：两个并列形容词。

difficulty: 她是你的妹妹吗？不，她是我的朋友。

examples_json: 确认关系。替换槽位：家庭关系名词。
column9: [{"en":"Is he your brother? Yes, he is.","zh":"他是你的兄弟吗？是的。"}]

text: He is not my brother. He is my cousin.

description: 否定+纠正。替换槽位：关系名词。
examples_json: [{"en":"She is not my teacher. She is my friend.","zh":"她不是我的老师。她是我的朋友。"}]

description: 描述关系。替换槽位：关系名词(classmates/colleagues/teammates)。
examples_json: [{"en":"We are classmates.","zh":"我们是同学。"}]

description: 表达群体感受。替换槽位：形容词(busy/tired/excited/ready)。
examples_json: [{"en":"We are very busy.","zh":"我们很忙。"}]

text: They are from the same city.
description: 描述群体来源。替换槽位：地点。

text: They are not here right now.

description: L1
examples_json: 确认群体身份。替换槽位：身份名词。

text: We are not late. We are on time.
meaning: 我们没有迟到。我们准时。
